name: Turbot
description: Turbot — Cloud governance platform enforcing security, compliance, and cost policies across AWS, Azure, and GCP accounts.

seo.title: Turbot — Security Scanning / Mobile App Sec
seo.meta_description: Turbot: Turbot — Cloud governance platform enforcing security, compliance, and cost policies across AWS, Azure, and GCP accounts.

when_to_use: Multi-cloud security policy enforcement across AWS, Azure, GCP
Automated compliance remediation for CIS Benchmark controls
Cloud cost and security governance for enterprise scale
SOC 2 continuous compliance evidence via Turbot Pipes
Policy-as-code framework for cloud governance automation

pros: Mature cloud governance across AWS, Azure, GCP
Extensive pre-built policy library for compliance
Deep automated remediation, not just detection
Steampipe integration unlocks SQL-based cloud queries
cons: Pricing aimed squarely at large orgs
Less slick UX than newer CNAPP upstarts
review.verdict: Deep, policy-driven cloud governance for big enterprises; too heavyweight for scrappier teams.
review.best_for: Large multi-cloud enterprises needing guardrails, remediation, and audit-ready compliance at scale.
review.not_for: Startups and mid-market teams wanting lightweight CSPM with quick time-to-value.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: custom pricing alone is not HWM evidence
